texto: My cock has been hiding since the day she arrived," Bjarni had said, but only when he was sure she was out of earshot, which was a full day after she left. "You worry for nothing brother," Bjorn had said, "for even a seiðr-wife (witch) cannot put a spell on something she can't see. It would be like trying to hit a louse with a spear-throw.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Giles Kristian: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “My cock has been hiding since the day she arrived," Bjarni had said, but only when he was sure sh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humour, viking-humour pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viking-humour e vikingbants.
